top_signals.title: UAE's exit from OPEC+ reduced the group's share of crude oil production and capacity
top_signals.summary: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) announced that it was leaving OPEC, effective on May 1. OPEC was formed in 1960 by Iraq, Iran, Kuwait, Saudi Arabia, and Venezuela, with the stated objective to "coordinate and unify petroleum policies among Member Countries." OPEC is best known for its effect on global crude oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: EXCLUSIVE: Putin likely to escalate Ukraine war, despite Trump peace push, sources say - Reuters
top_signals.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Putin likely to escalate Ukraine war, despite Trump peace push, sources say  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China could be the US tech hedge
top_signals.summary: Diversification is not about finding a market without risk — it is about finding a market whose risks are different
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump claims to be 'number one' on TikTok. What does that mean?
top_signals.summary: Trump is the most followed world leader on the app, with nearly 17 million followers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: What AI companies want for the millions they're spending on elections
top_signals.summary: Lawmakers are working on AI legislation — and two major industry PACs are each pushing for their own version of regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: The Payment Systems Regulator Annual Report and Accounts 2025 to 2026
top_signals.summary: This report summarises the Payment Systems Regulator Limited's (PSR) activities over the year 2025 to 2026. The PSR is required to publish this report under Paragraph 7 of Schedule 4 of the Financial Services (Banking Reform) Act 2013.

top_signals.title: Pentagon to explore cheaper replacements for the MQ-9 Reaper
top_signals.summary: The Massed Modular Aircraft project aims to develop a drone that can operate in such large numbers that it can absorb losses and still overwhelm defenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: The short-term results and the long-term risks of the “Donroe Doctrine.”
